animationTracks.purpose: Create a restrained dashboard-stage parallax background.
Bring the main dashboard frame into a stable angled view.
Cascade reusable grid cells without copying source dashboard content.
Pop 2-3 semantic callout pins tied to dashboard regions.
Sweep a column highlight to indicate the active data region.
Settle the dashboard grid for review and handoff.
